title: #AIS: Glenn Greenwald & Matt Taibbi discuss the new political divide, moderated by David Sacks
description:
This conversation was recorded LIVE at the All-In Summit in Miami!

0:00 David Sacks explains the origin of this panel on political discourse in America

2:56 Understanding the new political divide, how Trump's victory impacted discourse

12:37 Can mainstream media ever get back to relative neutrality?

29:15 Audience Q&A

analysis.summary: The All-In Summit hosted a panel discussion with Glenn Greenwald and Matt Taibbi, moderated by David Sacks, on the new political divide in America. They explored how Trump's victory impacted discourse and whether mainstream media can return to relative neutrality. The conversation also included an audience Q&A session.

takeaways.text: Trump's victory changed the political discourse
Audience Q&A session covered various topics
New political divide is complex and multifaceted
Media bias is a significant concern
Diverse perspectives are essential for understanding
The role of media in shaping public opinion is crucial

sentiment.notes: The conversation covered a range of topics, with both optimistic and cautious views expressed. The overall sentiment is mixed, reflecting the complexity of the issues discussed.

notable_moments.description: David Sacks introduces the panel discussion
Discussion on the new political divide begins
